name: San Diego OperaTalk! with Nic Reveles
original_name: San Diego OperaTalk! with Nic Reveles
overview: San Diego Opera's Director of Education guides viewers through an intriguing history of each opera produced by San Diego Opera. Learn about the composers' backgrounds and inspirations, the challenges they faced composing and staging the work, the reactions of audiences and critics, and recommendations for recordings, books and videos.
